glosses.pt: para que; a fim de que

sentences.target: Je t'explique afin que tu comprennes.

translations.fr: Je t'explique afin que tu comprennes.
translations.de: Ich erkläre es dir, damit du es verstehst.
translations.zh-Hans: 我给你解释，好让你明白。
translations.ru: Я объясняю, чтобы тебе было понятно.
translations.pt: Te explico para que você entenda.
translations.vi: Mình giải thích để bạn hiểu.
translations.nl: Ik leg het uit zodat je het begrijpt.
translations.uk: Я пояснюю, щоб тобі було зрозуміло.
translations.hi: मैं समझा रहा हूँ ताकि तुम समझ सको।
translations.sv: Jag förklarar så att du förstår.
translations.cs: Vysvětluju ti, aby ti to bylo jasné.
translations.ja: わかるように説明するね。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
2nd person singular clitic indirect object pronoun (COI), elided before a vowel-initial verb.
Present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive verb taking an indirect object with 'à/te'.
Subordinating element; part of the fixed purpose conjunction 'afin que' introducing a final (purpose) clause.
Complementizer in the purpose subordinator 'afin que', introducing a finite subjunctive clause.
2nd person singular subject pronoun.
Present subjunctive, 2nd person singular; subjunctive required after 'afin que' to express purpose.

sentences.target: Ouvre la fenêtre afin que ça sente moins.
sentences.reading: /uvʁ la fənɛtʁ afɛ̃ kə sa sɑ̃t mwɛ̃/

translations.fr: Ouvre la fenêtre afin que ça sente moins.
translations.ipa: /uvʁ la fənɛtʁ afɛ̃ kə sa sɑ̃t mwɛ̃/
translations.en: Open the window so it smells less.
translations.es: Abre la ventana para que huela menos.
translations.de: Mach das Fenster auf, damit es weniger riecht.
translations.it: Apri la finestra così si sente meno odore.
translations.zh-Hans: 把窗户打开，这样味道会淡一些。
translations.pt: Abra a janela para diminuir o cheiro.
translations.he: פתח את החלון כדי שיהיה פחות ריח.
translations.vi: Mở cửa sổ để mùi bớt đi.
translations.nl: Doe het raam open zodat de geur minder wordt.
translations.hu: Nyisd ki az ablakot, hogy csökkenjen a szag.
translations.hi: खिड़की खोलो ताकि गंध कम हो।
translations.pl: Otwórz okno, żeby zapach się zmniejszył.
translations.el: Άνοιξε το παράθυρο για να μειωθεί η μυρωδιά.
translations.nb: Åpne vinduet så det lukter mindre.
translations.sv: Öppna fönstret så luktar det mindre.
translations.ro: Deschide fereastra ca să miroasă mai puțin.
translations.cs: Otevři okno, aby byl zápach menší.
translations.da: Åbn vinduet, så det lugter mindre.
translations.ja: においが少なくなるように、窓を開けて。

tokens.explanation: Imperative, 2nd person singular; transitive verb addressing an implied 'tu'.
Definite article, feminine singular, agreeing with 'fenêtre'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'Ouvre'.
Subordinating element; part of 'afin que' introducing a purpose clause.
Complementizer in 'afin que', introducing a finite subjunctive clause.
Demonstrative pronoun (colloquial), 3rd person singular subject.
Present subjunctive, 3rd person singular; governed by 'afin que'.
Adverb of degree modifying the verb phrase ('smell less').

sentences.target: Je te dépose afin que tu puisses rentrer.
sentences.reading: /ʒə tə depɔz afɛ̃ kə ty pɥis ʁɑ̃tʁe/

translations.fr: Je te dépose afin que tu puisses rentrer.
translations.ipa: /ʒə tə depɔz afɛ̃ kə ty pɥis ʁɑ̃tʁe/
translations.en: I'll drop you off so you can get home.
translations.es: Te dejo cerca para que puedas volver a casa.
translations.de: Ich setze dich ab, damit du nach Hause kommst.
translations.it: Ti accompagno così puoi tornare a casa.
translations.ko: 집에 갈 수 있게 내가 데려다 줄게.
translations.zh-Hans: 我送你一程，好让你回家。
translations.yue: 我送你一程，等你可以返屋企。
translations.ru: Я подвезу тебя, чтобы ты смог добраться домой.
translations.pt: Eu te deixo perto para você poder ir para casa.
translations.he: אני אקפיץ אותך כדי שתוכל לחזור הביתה.
translations.vi: Mình chở bạn để bạn về nhà.
translations.ar: سأوصلك لكي تتمكن من العودة إلى البيت.
translations.nl: Ik zet je af zodat je naar huis kunt.
translations.uk: Я тебе підвезу, щоб ти дістався додому.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हें छोड़ दूँगा ताकि तुम घर जा सको।
translations.pl: Podrzucę cię, żebyś mógł wrócić do domu.
translations.el: Θα σε αφήσω ώστε να μπορέσεις να πας σπίτι.
translations.nb: Jeg setter deg av så du kan komme deg hjem.
translations.id: Aku antar kamu supaya kamu bisa pulang.
translations.sv: Jag skjutsar dig så att du kan åka hem.
translations.ro: Te las undeva ca să poți ajunge acasă.
translations.cs: Svezu tě, aby ses dostal domů.
translations.da: Jeg sætter dig af, så du kan komme hjem.
translations.ja: 家に帰れるように、送っていくね。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
2nd person singular clitic direct object pronoun (COD) before the verb.
Present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive verb taking a direct object ('te').
Subordinating element; part of 'afin que' introducing a purpose clause.
Complementizer in 'afin que', introducing a finite subjunctive clause.
2nd person singular subject pronoun.
Present subjunctive, 2nd person singular; modal verb governed by 'afin que'.
Infinitive complement of the modal 'pouvoir'.

sentences.target: Note ça afin que nous soyons sûrs.
sentences.reading: /nɔt sa afɛ̃ kə nu swajɔ̃ syʁ/

translations.fr: Note ça afin que nous soyons sûrs.
translations.ipa: /nɔt sa afɛ̃ kə nu swajɔ̃ syʁ/
translations.en: Write it down so we're sure.
translations.de: Schreib es auf, damit wir sicher sind.
translations.zh-Hans: 记下来，这样我们就能确定。
translations.yue: 寫低佢，咁我哋就有把握。
translations.ru: Запиши это, чтобы мы были уверены.
translations.he: רשום את זה כדי שנהיה בטוחים.
translations.vi: Ghi lại để chúng ta chắc chắn.
translations.nl: Schrijf het op zodat we zeker zijn.
translations.uk: Запиши це, щоб ми були впевнені.
translations.hi: इसे लिख लो ताकि हम निश्चित रहें।
translations.el: Σημείωσέ το ώστε να είμαστε σίγουροι.
translations.nb: Skriv det ned så vi er sikre.
translations.sv: Skriv ner det så att vi är säkra.
translations.ro: Notează asta ca să fim siguri.
translations.cs: Zapiš to, abychom si byli jisti.
translations.da: Skriv det ned, så vi er sikre.
translations.fi: Kirjoita se ylös, jotta olemme varmoja.
translations.ja: 確実にするために、書き留めておいて。

tokens.explanation: Imperative, 2nd person singular; transitive verb.
Demonstrative pronoun (colloquial), direct object of 'Note'.
Subordinating element; part of 'afin que' introducing a purpose clause.
Complementizer in 'afin que', introducing a finite subjunctive clause.
1st person plural subject pronoun.
Present subjunctive, 1st person plural of 'être' used as copula in the subordinate clause.
Predicate adjective, masculine plural agreeing with 'nous' (group including at least one male or generic).
